message:
🌱 Add atlantis: Display issue with split atlantis comments in Github mission (#1165)

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,73 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "atlantis-2240-display-issue-with-split-atlantis-comments-in-github",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "atlantis: Display issue with split atlantis comments in Github",
+    "description": "Display issue with split atlantis comments in Github. This issue affects 21+ users.",
+    "type": "troubleshoot",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify atlantis troubleshoot symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your atlantis deployment:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n atlantis -l app.kubernetes.io/name=atlantis\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=atlantis -n atlantis --tail=100 | grep -i error\n```\nLook for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review atlantis configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant atlantis configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n atlantis -l app.kubernetes.io/name=atlantis\nkubectl get configmap -n atlantis -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=atlantis\n```\n### Community Note\n\n* Please vote on this issue by adding a 👍 [reaction](https://blog.github.com/2016-03-10-add-reactions-to-pull-requests-issues-and-comments/) to the original issue to help the community and maintainers prioritize this request."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Display issue with split atlantis comments in Github",
+        "description": "## what\n\nHandle closure for code/detail/etc blocks appropriately when splitting VCS comments.\n\n## why\n\nThe logic for splitting comments has always assumed it would happen in the middle of a code block, which is not always the case, leading to poor UX.\n\n## tests\n\nUpdated the old tests and added new ones to verify behavior.\n\n## references\n\nSee the source issue for community-verified solutions."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm Display issue with split atlantis comments in… is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:\n```bash\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=atlantis -n atlantis --tail=50 --since=5m\nkubectl get events -n atlantis --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm that the issue symptoms are gone."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "## what\n\nHandle closure for code/detail/etc blocks appropriately when splitting VCS comments.\n\n## why\n\nThe logic for splitting comments has always assumed it would happen in the middle of a code block, which is not always the case, leading to poor UX.\n\n## tests\n\nUpdated the old tests and added new ones to verify behavior.\n\n## references",
+      "codeSnippets": []
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "atlantis",
+      "sandbox",
+      "app-definition",
+      "troubleshoot"
+    ],

+      "atlantis"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [],

+      "troubleshoot"

+    },

+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },

+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",

+      "kubectl"
+    ],

+  },
